title: FormStudioDefinition
description: Schema for a Form Studio form definition JSON. Equivalent role to XSD — validates structure, types, and allowed values.

title.description: Human-readable form name shown to users.

listName.description: SharePoint list identifier. Alphanumeric only, must start with a letter, no spaces. Generated by generateListName() which allows up to 60 chars.

layout.description: single = all sections on one page. multistep = sections split across wizard steps.

access.description: Who can access and submit this form.

submissionType.description: Submit = one-time only. SubmitEdit = user can return and edit their submission.

submitNotifyEmails.description: Comma-separated email addresses notified every time the form is submitted. Empty string if not configured. Set in the On Submit wizard step.

notifySubmitter.description: If true, the submitter receives a read-only HTML confirmation email on submission showing all their responses (system fields excluded). Defaults to true.

specificPeople.description: Always an empty array []. People are added by administrators via the UI, never via JSON.

formManagers.description: Always an empty array []. Managers are added by administrators via the UI, never via JSON.

sections.description: Ordered list of form sections. Each section contains fields.

conditions.description: Conditional visibility rules. A field is hidden until its condition is met.

dependentDropdowns.description: Dependent dropdown mappings. The child Choice field options change based on the parent Choice field value.

governance.description: Governance and suitability answers captured during the builder wizard. Saved into the form definition JSON and also promoted to dedicated SP columns on the Forms list for admin filtering.

existingProcess.description: Whether this form is based on an existing process.

existingProcessDetail.description: Free text description of the existing process. Only meaningful when existingProcess is 'yes'.

retention.description: How long submission data needs to be stored.

sensitiveData.description: Type of sensitive information this form will collect.

privacyAssessment.description: Whether a Privacy Impact Assessment (PIA/DPIA) has been completed.

externalAccess.description: Whether external parties are involved with this form's data.

continuityPlan.description: Free text — workaround if this form stops working.

dataOwner.description: The person accountable for this data. Null until selected. Written to SP as GovDataOwnerLookupId (integer SP user ID).

id.description: Unique section identifier. Must be non-empty and unique across all sections. e.g. s1, s2, s_intro, s_dept.

title.description: Section heading shown above the fields. Can be empty string for untitled sections.

stepIndex.description: For single layout: all sections use 0. For multistep layout: 0-based step number for this section.

managerOnly.description: If true, this section is hidden from submitters and only visible to form managers and admins.

notify.description: If true (and managerOnly is true), form managers can mark this section complete and trigger a notification email. Causes 5 system SP columns to be provisioned: {key}_Completed, {key}_CompletedDate, {key}_CompletedBy, {key}_CompletedComment, {key}_DeptEmail.

deptEmail.description: Comma-separated email addresses notified when this section is marked complete. Only meaningful when notify is true. Empty string otherwise.

fields.description: Ordered list of fields in this section. Includes user-defined fields and, when notify is true, system fields injected by buildSystemFields().

id.description: Globally unique field identifier across all sections. Must be non-empty and unique. e.g. f1, f2, f_name, f_date.

label.description: Field label shown to the user. Must be non-empty for all types except InfoText.

type.description: Field type. Determines the input control rendered.

description.description: Optional hint text shown beneath the label. Use empty string if not needed.

required.description: If true, the user must fill in this field before submitting. Always false for InfoText.

choices.description: Options list. Required (non-empty) for Choice and MultiChoice. Must be empty array [] for all other types.

accept.description: Accepted file extensions for FileUpload fields, e.g. '.pdf,.docx'. Empty string for all other types.

infoContent.description:
HTML content for InfoText fields only. Wrap plain text in

tags. Empty string for all other types.

infoStyle.description: Visual style for InfoText fields. Empty string for all other field types.

system.description: If true, this field was injected by buildSystemFields() and is auto-managed. It cannot be edited or deleted by the form author. Only present on fields inside managerOnly+notify sections.

systemRole.description: Role of this system field within the notify workflow. Only present when system is true.

internalName.description: Optional. SharePoint column internal name. Written back by the admin provisioning process. Max 32 chars, alphanumeric. Not required when generating JSON from a document.

Condition.description: A visibility rule. The field identified by showFieldId is hidden until whenFieldId matches equalsValue via operator.

showFieldId.description: The id of the field to show when the condition is met.

whenFieldId.description: The id of the field whose value is evaluated. Must differ from showFieldId.

operator.description: eq=equals, neq=not equals, gt=greater than, gte=>=, lt=less than, lte=<=, contains=string contains.

equalsValue.description: The value to compare against. For Boolean fields use 'true' or 'false'. For DateTime use YYYY-MM-DD.

DependentDropdown.description: Links two Choice fields so the child's options change based on the parent's selected value.

parentFieldId.description: The id of the parent Choice field that drives the child.

childFieldId.description: The id of the child Choice field whose options change. Must differ from parentFieldId.

mapping.description: Keys are parent choice values. Each value is an array of strings that become the child's options when that parent value is selected.
